verses.text: Azariah meets Asa with God's word: 'The LORD is with you, while ye be with him; if ye seek him, he will be found; but if ye forsake him, he will forsake you.' The promise turns on the heart. God meets the seeker and withdraws from the one who lets Him go.

Azariah meets Asa with God's word: 'The LORD is with you, while ye be with him; if ye seek him, he will be found; but if ye forsake him, he will forsake you.' The promise turns on the heart. God meets the seeker and withdraws from the one who lets Him go.

The prophet recalls long seasons when Israel was without the true God, His law, and peace, vexed by every kind of trouble. Forsaking God breeds unrest. When a people lose their God, they lose their rest, set adrift in fear and strife.

The prophet recalls long seasons when Israel was without the true God, His law, and peace, vexed by every kind of trouble. Forsaking God breeds unrest. When a people lose their God, they lose their rest, set adrift in fear and strife.

'Be ye strong therefore, and let not your hands be weak: for your work shall be rewarded.' The promise of reward steadies the hand. God does not let faithful labour go unpaid, so His servants may work on with courage.

Heartened by the word, Asa puts away the idols, renews the LORD's altar, and many from Israel join him, seeing the LORD is with him. Bold obedience draws others in. When a leader takes courage for God, the faithful rally to his side.

Heartened by the word, Asa puts away the idols, renews the LORD's altar, and many from Israel join him, seeing the LORD is with him. Bold obedience draws others in. When a leader takes courage for God, the faithful rally to his side.
They gather at Jerusalem and offer of their spoil to the LORD. Their thanksgiving is generous. Those who have seen God's deliverance bring back to Him a glad portion of what He gave.
They gather at Jerusalem and offer of their spoil to the LORD. Their thanksgiving is generous. Those who have seen God's deliverance bring back to Him a glad portion of what He gave.

They covenant to seek the LORD with all their heart and soul, swearing it with gladness, and He gives them rest on every side. Whole-hearted dedication meets whole-hearted blessing. God is found of those who seek Him in earnest, and gives them peace.

They covenant to seek the LORD with all their heart and soul, swearing it with gladness, and He gives them rest on every side. Whole-hearted dedication meets whole-hearted blessing. God is found of those who seek Him in earnest, and gives them peace.

Asa even removes his own grandmother from being queen for her idol, though the high places remain; yet his heart was perfect, and he brings dedicated things into God's house, with no more war till his thirty-fifth year. Zeal spares no idol, however dear. A heart wholly God's puts away even what it loves.
